subcodes.first_line: O trusted one of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Your letter was received, wherein you had offered praise of the friends in Iraq and Hamadán, and its contents were understood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء نامه شما رسید ستایش از یاران عراق و همدان نمودی بودید مفهوم
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
